meta.description: Oracle 到 OceanBase (Oracle 模式) 迁移兼容性规则集 — OceanBase Oracle 模式高度兼容
meta.author: DMA Team

rules.name: NVL 兼容
rules.description: Oracle NVL 在 OceanBase Oracle 模式下直接兼容

rules.name: DECODE 兼容
rules.description: Oracle DECODE 在 OceanBase 中直接兼容

rules.name: SYSDATE 兼容
rules.description: Oracle SYSDATE 在 OceanBase 中直接兼容

rules.name: TO_CHAR/TO_DATE 兼容
rules.description: OceanBase 兼容 TO_CHAR/TO_DATE，但部分格式码有差异

rules.name: CONNECT BY → 兼容/递归CTE
rules.description: OceanBase 兼容 CONNECT BY（需升级到较新版本），否则用 WITH RECURSIVE
rules.exampleSqlSource: SELECT * FROM tree START WITH pid IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR id=pid;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: SELECT * FROM tree START WITH pid IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR id=pid;

rules.name: ROWNUM → ROWNUM/LIMIT
rules.description: OceanBase 兼容 ROWNUM，推荐用 LIMIT 替代

rules.name: 序列 NEXTVAL 兼容
rules.description: Oracle 序列语法在 OceanBase Oracle 模式下直接兼容

rules.name: MERGE INTO 兼容
rules.description: OceanBase 支持 MERGE INTO，但 LOG ERRORS 等高级子句不支持
rules.exampleSqlSource: MERGE INTO t USING dual ON (t.id=1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name='A';
rules.exampleSqlTarget: MERGE INTO t USING dual ON (t.id=1) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name='A';

rules.name: VARCHAR2/NUMBER 兼容
rules.description: OceanBase Oracle 模式直接支持 VARCHAR2/NUMBER/CLOB
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE TABLE t (name VARCHAR2(100), amount NUMBER(10,2));
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE TABLE t (name VARCHAR2(100), amount NUMBER(10,2));

rules.name: DATE(含时间) → TIMESTAMP
rules.description: Oracle DATE 含时分秒，OceanBase DATE 仅日期，推荐 TIMESTAMP

rules.name: PL/SQL 基本语法兼容
rules.description: OceanBase Oracle 模式兼容 PL/SQL，但部分系统包(UTL_FILE等)不同
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p1 AS BEGIN NULL; END;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p1 AS BEGIN NULL; END;

rules.name: PACKAGE 支持
rules.description: OceanBase 较新版本支持 Oracle PACKAGE 语法，旧版本需拆分
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkg1 AS FUNCTION f1 RETURN NUMBER; END;
rules.exampleSqlTarget: CREATE OR REPLACE PACKAGE pkg1 AS FUNCTION f1 RETURN NUMBER; END;

rules.name: TABLESPACE/STORAGE → 移除
rules.description: OceanBase 表空间管理与 Oracle 不同，建议移除 TABLESPACE/STORAGE 子句
rules.exampleSqlSource: CREATE TABLE t (id INT) TABLESPACE users STORAGE (INITIAL 64K);
